summary: Read the full local plan file <machine-local-path> (1).md, verified SHA-256 matched 4B8C7447D4048781935EC7D8B8223112953941BEB4060AA0661AD6D298AE4DE7, and analyzed it in Korean with emphasis on outcome metrics, final-readiness honesty, repeated-explanation reduction, memory-on vs memory-off behavior improvement, and durable knowledge retention. No source/requested files were edited.
decisions: Treat the plan as a strong implementable draft, not final OS validation.
Promote outcome/effectiveness metrics from late P2-style implementation to a cross-cutting final-readiness gate.
Recommend explicit memory-on vs memory-off paired evaluation because the current plan implies improvement but does not fully define an A/B proof contract.
Separate durable active knowledge from historical/stale/candidate evidence to avoid retaining stale claims as active authority.
next_steps: If this plan is revised, add an explicit memory-on/off effectiveness gate with baseline prompts, scoring rubric, and pass thresholds.
Define concrete repeated-explanation metrics and wire them to task lifecycle, retrieval, behavior recall, and final readiness.
Keep source/requested file unchanged and use this read-only analysis as trace evidence only.
